narrative:
Catawba Island 2 (precinct in Ottawa County) has 923 registered voters, with 39.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.3 percentage points.
